title: vulneraria heterophylla var. rubriflora
intro: Vulneraria heterophylla var. rubriflora, also known as Alpine Betony, is a flowering plant that belongs to the saxifrage family. It has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues due to its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing stress and promoting relaxation. Alpine Betony can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
